findings.finding: No independent source for trigger phrases is named anywhere in the plan (past user transcripts, prior session logs, deliberate brainstorm of utterances NOT in current description). Spec R2 implicitly required such a source.
findings.evidence_quote: Per spec R2, each phrase must be (a) canonical slash-command name, (b) multi-word imperative utterance, OR (c) path/file-shape token

findings.finding: Task 14 filter grep -vE "(morning-review|overnight)" matches substring anywhere on a diff line, not directory-boundary — silently drops lines like 'Only in skills/diagnose/references: overnight-pattern.md'.
findings.evidence_quote: diff -r --brief skills plugins/cortex-core/skills 2>&1 | grep -vE "(morning-review|overnight)" | grep -E "^Only in|differ" | wc -l

findings.finding: Tasks 7, 10, 12, 13 list plugins/cortex-core/skills/<name>/... files annotated '(auto-regenerated)' without specifying whether implementer must commit or invoke regen script for the mirror to update before subsequent verifications.
R11 acceptance regex ^[a-z-]+\s+\d+$ is lowercase-only; Task 1 What permits TOTAL or total. Plan does not pin case.
findings.evidence_quote: emits one row per skill plus a TOTAL row in the form `<skill-name> <bytes>` (or `total <sum>`)

findings.finding: No task invokes /doctor post-trim to confirm Claude Code listing budget actually changed. Single available external cross-check omitted.
findings.evidence_quote: If `/doctor` is unavailable in this session/execution context (interactive command), Task 2 falls back to byte-count + tooling-gap note per spec edge-case.
